message:
fix(codegen): Fix double-brace and label syntax bugs

- eval.zig: Change `}}` to `}` in emit() calls (not format strings)
- dict.zig: Fix inline block label - use manual label generation
  instead of emitInlineBlockStart which was emitting in wrong order
  Also close block with `})` not just `}`

These were causing syntax errors like:
- `}}).eql(...)` - extra brace from emit("}}")
- `:__m7_cast {` - missing opening paren for labeled block
